  1. uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
Provides specialized adapters for translating between Anahata's model-agnostic domain objects and OpenAI-compatible wire formats.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible used by uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
    Class
    Description
    OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
    A universal AI provider for any API endpoint compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completion specification.
    OpenAiCompatibleModel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractModel that communicates with any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completion API using the standard JDK HttpClient.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible used by uno.anahata.asi.modal
    Class
    Description
    OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
    A universal AI provider for any API endpoint compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completion specification.
    OpenAiCompatibleModel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractModel that communicates with any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completion API using the standard JDK HttpClient.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible used by uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
    Class
    Description
    OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
    A universal AI provider for any API endpoint compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completion specification.
    OpenAiCompatibleHostedTool
    Enumeration of native server-side tools provided by OpenAI via the Responses API.
    OpenAiCompatibleModel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractModel that communicates with any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completion API using the standard JDK HttpClient.
    OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
    Base implementation for OpenAI-specific model messages.
    OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle
    Defines the strategy for extracting reasoning/thought content from an OpenAI-compatible response.
    OpenAiCompatibleResponse
    Encapsulates the complete response from an OpenAI-compatible API.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible used by uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
    Class
    Description
    OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle
    Defines the strategy for extracting reasoning/thought content from an OpenAI-compatible response.
